description: Analyze themes driven by rates, credit, currency, inflation, fiscal policy, and balance sheets.
core_questions: Which macro variable is the true driver?
How does it transmit to revenue, margins, funding cost, asset values, or risk appetite?
Is the theme early-cycle, mid-cycle, late-cycle, or recessionary?
Which companies are leveraged to the driver and which are hedged?
What macro print or policy shift would reverse the theme?
